chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ كَانَ لَهُ حَمْلٌ فَنَوَى أَنْ يُسَمِّيَهُ مُحَمَّداً أَوْ عَلِيّاً وُلِدَ لَهُ ذَكَرٌ وَ الدُّعَاءِ لِذَلِكَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 5 – The one for whom is a pregnancy, so he makes the intention that he would name him Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> or Ali<sup>asws</sup>, there would be born for him a male, and the supplication for that

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/21)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ كَانَ لَهُ حَمْلٌ فَنَوَى أَنْ يُسَمِّيَهُ مُحَمَّداً أَوْ عَلِيّاً وُلِدَ لَهُ غُلَامٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from one of his companions, raising it, said,
‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The one for whom was a pregnancy, so he makes the intention that he would be naming him as Muhammad, or Ali, there would be born for him, a boy’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from certain persons of our people in a marfu ‘ manner who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘If one’s wife is pregnant and he keeps in his intention to name him Muhammad or Ali, a boy will be born to him.’”
